panels.description: Dynamic medium shot: Rikki-tikki the mongoose is deep inside a dark, narrow earth tunnel. His fur is slick with moisture, his eyes wide and glowing with intensity. His claws are dug deep into the hot, damp soil of the slope, bracing himself against the incline. Heavy shadows create a sense of claustrophobia and danger.

Medium shot: Darzee the tailorbird sits perched on a low-hanging branch near the entrance of the snake hole. The tall grass nearby has gone still. Darzee has a mournful expression, his head bowed, looking down at the dark opening in the ground.

bubbles.text: It is all over with Rikki-tikki! We must sing his death song. Valiant Rikki-tikki is dead!

panels.description: Wide shot: The tall garden grass quivers violently. Suddenly, Rikki-tikki drags himself out of the hole, leg by leg. He is completely covered in red dirt and mud, looking exhausted but victorious. He is licking his whiskers in a cool, collected manner. Bright sunlight begins to filter through the leaves.

Medium close-up: Rikki-tikki stands on the grass, shaking his body vigorously so that a cloud of dust flies out of his fur. He is in the middle of a sneeze. His expression is one of immense satisfaction and relief. The background is a lush, out-of-focus garden.

bubbles.text: It is all over. The widow will never come out again.

panels.description: Wide shot: Rikki-tikki is curled up into a tight, fuzzy ball in the soft, green grass, fast asleep. In the foreground, a line of tiny red ants is trooping down a grass stem toward the hole. The lighting is the golden, warm glow of late afternoon.

bubbles.text: He slept and slept, for he had done a hard day's work.

panels.description: Wide shot: A vibrant garden scene. The Coppersmith bird is perched high, beating out a rhythm. Colorful birds are mid-flight, and frogs are peeking out from a pond, all appearing to celebrate. The atmosphere is joyous and bright.

bubbles.text: Ding-dong-tock! Nag is dead! Nagaina is dead! Ding-dong-tock!

panels.description: Medium shot: Rikki-tikki sits alert on a sundial in the middle of the garden. He looks proud and healthy, his fur clean and sleek. He watches the garden with keen, sharp eyes, ready to jump. The background shows the peaceful family house under a clear sky.

bubbles.text: He kept that garden as a mongoose should, till never a cobra dared show its head inside the walls.
